title: DPS Meter
description: A real-time DPS tracking  with configurable HUD and auto-reset functionality.
body:
# DPS Meter ⚔️

**DPS Meter** is a lightweight, highly customizable combat analysis tool for Minecraft. It provides real-time feedback on your damage output, helping you optimize your gear and playstyle.

## ✨ Features

### 📊 Real-Time Statistics
Get instant feedback on your combat performance with a sleek data overlay:
*   **Current & Average DPS**: Know your burst and sustained damage.
*   **Total Damage**: Track cumulative damage over a fight.
*   **Combat Timer**: See exactly how long you've been fighting.
*   **Hit Rate**: Attacks per second tracking.
*   **Damage Taken**: Monitor your survivability.

### 💥 Floating Combat Text
Experience RPG-style numbers popping off your enemies!
*   **Standard Hits**: Crisp **Red** numbers.
*   **Critical Hits**: Animated **Gold** numbers that scale and bob for satisfying feedback.

### 🛠️ Complete Customization
Access the in-game menu (Default Key: `O`) to tweak everything:
*   **HUD Editor**: Drag the status panel to any position on your screen.
*   **Visual Control**: Scale the UI size (`0.5x` - `3.0x`) and adjust background opacity.
*   **Selective Display**: Toggle specific metrics on/off to keep your screen clean.
*   **Pet Tracking**: Choose whether to include your pets' damage in your DPS (Summoners rejoice!).

## 🎮 Usage

1.  **Start Fighting**: Valid attacks automatically start a combat session.
2.  **Auto-Reset**: The meter resets automatically after a configurable timeout (default 10s) or when you switch dimensions/die.
3.  **Manual Control**: Use keybinds to Reset Stats (`P`) or Toggle the Overlay completely.
